content:
———————————————————————

Mom locks down her transfer to a new apartment and separation documents. As she heads to the family meeting she called herself, her sister shows up. Mom’s sister was meant to take their unborn child (growing in the basement) and she’s come to tell Mom she can’t (in fact, mom leaving excited her sister so much it inspired her to want to leave too), but before she can tell Mom, Dad shows up and breaks the conversation up and forces them all to fake pleasantries over dinner, which her sister has now been forced to join.

However, everyone in the family (who we thought mom was turning and running away from) all have their exit plans to leave the family—and of course, ironically, no one knows.

In the second act, at some point everyone leaves the house except Mom. Mom’s gets trapped and left behind in the house to watch.
